If you could control an element (e.g. earth, fire, air, water) which would you want to control, and why?
Air—because it’s everywhere. You could move fast, control weather, amplify sound, and subtly influence almost any environment without being seen.
Air. It feels the most versatile. Can use it to fly. Could create a little bubble of air and wander around on the sea floor.
Water. I think it is the most versatile.
Water. Water can beat almost all of the other elements. Plus, water is life and "Life finds a way."
Air just to be able to fly
Water. Make crops grow. Provide “clean” water to those who are dying of dehydration. Drown my enemies…
Water - the most valuable resource, involved in different aspects of human life, very versatile and could be very dangerous if you know physics 😈
Air so that I could always have a cool breeze and a billowing cloak
Air. It's a subtle strength and can be very powerful when used creatively. I've also always wanted to fly.

since avatar airbender shows us many power ups for all elements - i prefer air still) is is deadly and easiest way to fly among all other elements
also i feel my type of life kinda evasive
Probably water. I like water types in pokemon
Water, i i think its the coolest and has the most versatility
Earth as long as it would equate to metals and minerals. It could be really useful as a way to create and build. Making money would be fairly simple as well.

Water. You can make water that's boiling, frozen or whatever temperature you want instantly. The shower is never too hot, tea is never too cold and rain becomes a pleasant sensation. Love the snow but hate driving in it? Melt the snow on the road and leave it all in the gardens and fields. No waiting for a pan to boil when making pasta, no tepid drinking water.
Water all the way, all living thing contain water
Air. Flight would be dope for sure

I think fire. Being able to heat anything or stay warm when in a cold place would be great for survival. Would save me a bunch of money on heating cost if I could just warm the house with fire coming out of my hand too!
